name: Tsugumi Shirasaki
description: Height: 156cm Three sizes: 86-59-87 Tsugumi is the Library Club president as chosen by Tamamo, who she considers to be her best friend. She is a bit of an airhead at all times but she can manage the club well but always with the help of Tamamo. When Tamamo isn't around for advice about the club, she always asks Kyoutarou for help.

name: Yi Wang
description: In order to prevent the role of OOC, he plays the male villain who is vicious on the surface and follow the spirit of the drama in the script. However, Qin Xian had already seen his inner thoughts clearly.

name: Yoriko Kichijouji
description: A mangaka and author of "Today will be sweet" . She used to be [Abiko](https://anilist.co/character/237576/Abiko-Samejima)'s mentor.

name: Yukari Mishakuji
description: Formerly a student of Ichigen Miwa and the senior of Kuroh Yatogami, he left the colorless clan and is now a J-Rank member of the Green Clan.

name: Yuu Tendou
description: One of beybladers who was in Ryuga's group. His beyblade is Flame Libra. ~!He became friends with Ginga and others later, and he is a sub member of Team Japan (Team GANGAN GALAXY) of World Blade Battle in 2nd season.!~

name: Yuuichi Sumida
description: Sumida is a 15-year-old school kid living a dystopian existence where his parents hope and encourage him to die. His life gets more miserable when his mother decides to run away with her lover. Sumida is left alone to manage the family's languishing boat-rental business. He fights frequently with his father and tends to reject friendly advances of others. Sumida sees his simple dream for an ordinary future rapidly evaporating before his eyes.

name: Yuuyoku no Shishi
description: Winged Lion is the unnamed entity that is the guardian spirit of the Golden Country trapped by the Lunatic Magician in the depths of the dungeon on the Island. As its epithet describes, it looks much like a lion with large, eagle-like wings sprouting from either side of its ribs. The Winged Lion appears as a motif throughout the dungeon, such as the statues in the castle town, the water fountains, and on the hilt of Laios' sword.
mediaTitles: Doodles by Ryoko Kui: Daydream Hour
searchTerms: Doodles by Ryoko Kui: Daydream Hour

name: Yuzu Iizuka
description: __Height:__ 165 cm Yuzu is a student at Misato West High School. She goes to school on her moped. Her best friend is [Kaede](https://anilist.co/character/87708/Kaede-Ikeno).

name: Zero
description: Legendary Reploid. In the Manga he is weak and cowardly, but when his helmet appears he becomes powerful. He is on a journey to discover his past.

name: Agari Kamiya
description: She is a second year at Suzumegahara Middle School in the table tennis club who was the undisputed ace prior to Koyori Tsumujikaze joining the club. (Source: Shakunetsu no Takkyuu Musume Wiki)

name: Airi
description: A scythe-wielding ghost girl in a maid costume, Airi was given human form by the evil Swamp Witch in her quest for domination. Airi serves every whim of her mistress quite willingly. Used primarily for assassinations, she can literally suck the vitality of her enemies simply by touching them.

name: Aleister Chamber
nativeName: アレイスト・チェンバー
description: Viscount Druitt is a Noble that was one of the main suspects for the Jack the Ripper murders. He graduated from Medical School but does not practice medicine. He is later revealed to be kidnapping women and using their body parts for the Black Market and was arrested by Scotland Yard. He returns as a curry judge and a ice sculpture judge, with Ciel believing that he must have bribed his way out of jail. He has a habit of relating anything he sees as beautiful to that of women. name: Chihaya Ohtori
description: **Height:** 159 cm Chihaya is one of the heroines of Rewrite who suddenly transfers into Kotarou's high school. She is constantly arguing with Kotarou.

name: Colonnello
description: __Height:__ 41 cm __Flame:__ Rain Holder of the Blue pacifier. Colonnello is in charge of the training ground behind Mafia Land and was a former member of the COMSUBIN, an elite Italian Navy unit. Colonnello acts like a rival towards Reborn and vice-versa; they would often consider each other's attacks weak and then proceeds to attack the other. Though they are rivals, he shares many traits with Reborn, like being a merciless tutor, suddenly taking naps, and having a sharp tongue, he also finish

name: Don Kan'onji
description: Don Kanonji is a popular spirit medium who has a television show called Ghost Bust (English: "Spirit Hunter") that is watched by 25% of Japan's population. His catch phrases are "Smells like bad spirits!" and "Spirits are always with you" His show consists of getting rid of ghosts and sending their spirits to heaven. Kanonji's initial method of doing so forcefully turns souls into hollows, though he never realizes this. Ichigo Kurosaki informs him of his mistake, earning the title of "#1 Discipl
mediaTitles: Bleach: Spirits Are Forever With You

name: Driver
description: B+ rank villain of the Gadam Vilzone.

name: Ectoplasm
description: __Height:__ 180 cm (5' 11") __Affiliation:__ Yuuei __Quirk:__ Clones Ectoplasm has the ability to produce ectoplasm from his mouth and transform it into clones of himself. He can create up to thirty clones at once, and push his limit to thirty-six if he's feeling good. He can also produce a giant clone of himself, although this sacrifices his ability to produce normal-sized ones for the time being. His clones can be defeated with a strong blow, but otherwise, only Ectoplasm can dispel them.

name: Gennosuke Kouga
description: Erroneously humbling himself before the Iga, Gennosuke is the very definition of honorable. In hopes of winning their admiration for the sake of his botrothed, Oboro, he will do anything to ensure their matrimony. While Gennosuke tries to break the long-lasting hateful tradition and welcome the Iga as family, they plot against him, picking off his clansmen one by one.
